benchmark_scope: recommendation-layer E2E-style benchmark evidence; not full frontend/backend/AI production runtime validation
limitations: This package freezes recommendation-layer benchmark evidence only.
It does not establish full-system runtime correctness across frontend, backend routing, and live AI integration.
The before path is a frozen weaker recommendation-layer baseline with literal extraction and no derived-slot inference.
The after path is the current recommendation-layer benchmark adapter with conservative derived-slot inference before calling the unchanged controller.
The repository does not expose a dedicated production query-to-recommendation runtime entrypoint.
